title: ALEMAN, CORDERO, GALINDO & LEE TRUST (BVI) LIMITED — Administrative Penalties to the total of $125,000
text:
Administrative penalties in the aggregate amount of $125,000.00 were imposed against ALEMAN, CORDERO, GALINDO & LEE TRUST (BVI) LIMITED for its contraventions of the Anti-Money Laundering Terrorist Financing Code of Practice, 2008 (the “AMLTF Code of Practice”)

ENFORCEMENT ACTION
ALEMAN, CORDERO, GALINDO & LEE TRUST (BVI) LIMITED
Enforcement Summary:
1. Administrative penalties in the aggregate amount of $125,000.00 were imposed against ALEMAN, CORDERO,
GALINDO & LEE TRUST (BVI) LIMITED for its contraventions of the Anti-Money Laundering Terrorist Financing Code of
Practice, 2008 (the “AMLTF Code of Practice”):
• Section 20 of AMLTF Code of Practice (Requirements of Enhanced Customer Due Diligence); and
• Section 21 of the AMLTF Code of Practice (Requirement to review and keep up-to-date CDD).
Enforcement Action: Imposition of Administrative Penalties in the total amount of $125,000.00
Action Date: 21st November 2025
Matter ID: 112125/060
action_type: Administrative Penalties to the total of $125,000
